message: 45 Delphi/Achilles broker positions untracked by any sleeve. Ledgers empty. Needs /oracle-reconcile for delphi and achilles.

Zeus tend-only pass (2026-07-07): oracle_ledger.jsonl and oracle_journal.jsonl record 3 buy fills dated 2026-07-07 (SEER $699.75 @2.17, order 6a4ce239-a406-4846-a354-42f7771fbda0; NNDM $649.04 @1.46, order 6a4ce246-c564-4fb2-9a52-2682c700afa7; FULC $604.50 @3.73, order 6a4ce252-a3c4-48a1-b3c0-a10275c52e78 -- the operator-funded convex book referenced in cache/oracle_paused.json) that are NOT reflected in cache/oracle_sleeve.json (positions={}, cash=4109.68, unchanged since the 2026-07-06 legacy-cohort liquidation). This session has no ROBINHOOD_* credentials / broker MCP tool to independently confirm the fills against the live account, so it did NOT hand-write the reconciliation into the sleeve (that would fabricate live-money state on inference alone). Kill-condition check was still performed via WebSearch on public price/news for SEER/NNDM/FULC: no kill_condition triggered for any of the three (SEER CEO/Radoff bids both still live, stock +37.71pct; NNDM Infinite Epigenetics deal still term-sheet/pre-vote, not completed; FULC still in Leerink strategic review, no reverse merger announced; no name near the 40pct drawdown-from-entry kill). NEXT SESSION WITH BROKER ACCESS MUST: pull actual account positions/fills for SEER/NNDM/FULC and reconcile oracle_sleeve.json to match reality (either confirm fills and update positions/cash, or discover the orders never filled and reverse the journal/ledger entries).
